title: Financial condition of parish to be reported
doc_html:
§1240.  Financial condition of parish to be reported

The report shall also contain a complete statement of the financial condition of the parish, the nature and amount of indebtedness, the credits, whether judgment, or otherwise, cash on hand, and rate of taxation.
doc_text:
§1240.  Financial condition of parish to be reported
The report shall also contain a complete statement of the financial condition of the parish, the nature and amount of indebtedness, the credits, whether judgment, or otherwise, cash on hand, and rate of taxation.
